hero.title:
Code. Strategy.
Governance.
hero.description: Hello! I'm Abhindev Vijayan, an MCA graduate and software developer. I bridge the gaps between clean system architecture, strategic data play, and digital policy compliance.
phrases: am an MCA Graduate & Software Developer.
apply Cricket Strategy to build agile code.
love researching Civic Politics & Tech Law.

pillars.title: The Tech Architect
pillars.subtitle: MCA Graduate & Software Developer
pillars.description: With a solid academic foundation in Master of Computer Applications (MCA), I design robust, reliable, and scalable web solutions. I love translating intricate algorithms and database normalization patterns into efficient, readable code.

pillars.title: The Cricket Strategist
pillars.subtitle: Sports Analyser & Team Player
pillars.description: Cricket is more than a sport to me—it is a lesson in high-performance strategy. I apply cricketing principles like team synergy, adaptive playing strategies under pressure, and rich historical data analysis to navigate agile software sprints.

pillars.title: The Civic Thinker
pillars.subtitle: Politics & Tech Law Devotee
pillars.description: Fascinated by administrative policies, legal frameworks, and digital governance. I believe software developers must understand compliance, licensing, and user privacy rights (GDPR/IPR) to construct technologies that truly support democratic societies.

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: Designing modern, responsive web applications with clean React/Next.js frontends and optimized Node.js rest APIs. Emphasis on performance and responsive UX.

services.title: System Design & DB Tuning
services.description: Structuring relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) with efficient indexes, normalized schemas, and custom triggers to guarantee high data integrity and lightning query speeds.

services.title: Sports Data & Analytics
services.description: Building specialized performance visualizers and analytics engines. Perfect for cricket tournament modeling, player statistics analysis, and data-driven insights.

services.title: Compliance & Policy Consulting
services.description: Reviewing codebase architectures for privacy regulations compliance, choosing the correct open-source licenses, and auditing systems for digital law alignment.

projects.title: LegisCode
projects.description: An intelligent search portal that indexes legal articles and guidelines on digital rights, making compliance simple for software developers.

projects.title: CricStats Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive data analytics system visualizing historical bowler economy rates, run-chase probabilities, and team dynamics during match points.

projects.title: Civix Core
projects.description: A secure, glassmorphic civic engagement portal where community members can participate in direct local policy polls and debate legislative proposals.

projects.title: OmniTask Board
projects.description: A full-stack collaborative project management utility featuring real-time kanban state synchronization, analytical reports, and dark themes.
